mapper.insert: insert into auction (auctionId,auctionItem,auctionTime,auctionPrice,auctionOwnId,auctionRoleId,auctionGuild,password) values ( #{auctionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{auctionItem, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{auctionTime, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{auctionPrice, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{auctionOwnId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{auctionRoleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{auctionGuild, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR});
mapper.update: update auction set auctionItem = #{auctionItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, auctionTime = #{auctionTime,jdbcType=BIGINT }, auctionPrice = #{auctionPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER }, auctionOwnId = #{auctionOwnId,jdbcType=BIGINT }, auctionRoleId = #{auctionRoleId,jdbcType=BIGINT }, auctionGuild = #{auctionGuild,jdbcType=BIGINT }, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR } where auctionId = #{auctionId,jdbcType=BIGINT};
